title: A Beautiful Menace: Invasive Orange Hawkweed Spreads Through Southeast Alaska
summary: Photo caption: An orange hawkweed plant growing along Sandy Beach Road in Petersburg. (Photo by Olivia Schmidt/KFSK) A visually striking but ecologically devastating plant is spreading through Southeast Alaska: the orange hawkweed. As you drive past the ditches orange hawkweed calls home, you might not even register that it’s there. The flame-colored blooms seem like any other wildflower popping out of the ground in spring and summertime. But don’t...

title: Victory for Cook Inlet: Lease Sale 258 Overturned!
summary: We’re thrilled to share an exciting win for Alaska’s environment! Recently, a federal district court judge overturned Lease Sale 258 , marking a significant victory for our coastal communities and the Cook Inlet ecosystem.
